MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Casandra Coats.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Pierce Jr. is present.
Attorney Sebastian Kaplan appearing for defendant in limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Phillip Keith, litigants and counsel confer in Dept 502B , for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-17-2015 is vacated.
